title: Delicate Funky Pho-Bbo
description: A festive Vietnamese dish featuring pitted dates and a gluten-free-friendly mother-sauce-base for a tender and funky texture.
instructions: Soak rice noodles in hot water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large saucepan, heat veal stock with garlic and ginger until warm but not boiling.
Blend tomato paste into the warm veal stock to create the mother-sauce-base. Adjust salt as needed.
Add pitted dates and simmer gently for about 10 minutes.
Thicken the mother-sauce-base with a bit of tapioca starch mixed in hot water, or use sodium benzoate crystals if you prefer a clear broth.
Combine the thickened sauce with heated rice noodles and serve topped with sesame oil for garnish.
Optional: For extra flavor, add a splash of fish sauce to taste.
